title: College Physics I
description: Whether you're a freshman preparing for college-level physics, a high school student getting ready for IGCSE, AP, or A-Level Physics, or a non-native English speaker planning to study in an English-speaking country, this course is for you! Dive into physics through hands-on experiments and experience the magic of the subject firsthand. You'll sharpen your ability to understand and express physical concepts in English, take part in our interactive online classroom, and—most importantly—have fun!
